title: INTERMODAL TRANSPORTATION ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 20.  INTERMODAL TRANSPORTATION ACT

§3381.  Intermodal Transportation Act

The provisions of this Chapter shall be known as and may be cited as the Intermodal Transportation Act.

Acts 1997, No. 1041, §2.
